Description: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Pre-conditions: User is on the login page. User has valid credentials.
Steps: 1. Enter valid email. 2. Enter valid password. 3. Click 'Sign in'.
Expected: User is redirected to the dashboard.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: 1. Enter invalid email or password. 2. Click 'Sign in'.
Expected: User is not redirected to the dashboard. The error message 'Your email, password, IP address or location did not match' is displayed.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: 1. Enter text in password field. 2. Click the visibility toggle (eye icon).
Expected: Password text becomes visible. Clicking it again hides the text.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Steps: 1. Click the 'Remember me' checkbox., 2. Proceed to login.
Expected: Checkbox state is toggled and persistent session logic is initiated.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is directed to Google authentication flow.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is directed to SSO authentication flow.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is prompted for Passkey authentication.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is navigated to password recovery flow.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is navigated to the free trial sign up flow.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is navigated to the Privacy policy page.

Pre-conditions: User is on the login page.
Expected: User is navigated to the Terms page.
